iot.topicrule.republishaction.Qos.Description: The Quality of Service (QoS) level to use when republishing messages. The default value is 0.

iot.topicrule.republishaction.RoleArn.Description: The ARN of the IAM role that grants access.

iot.topicrule.republishaction.Topic.Description: The name of the MQTT topic.
